title: Google Cal Integration- create mutiple events per item
excerpt: I am working on a content production board what I would like to have integrated with google calendar. My hope is to have three columns with three dates per item, and to have each of those three dates reflected as events …

posts.author: Cailin88 (Cailin Barrett-Bressack)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am working on a content production board what I would like to have integrated with google calendar. My hope is to have three columns with three dates per item, and to have each of those three dates reflected as events in the google calendar. However, I’m finding that even when I code multiple multile integrations, only one event will appear per item.
These are the two integrations I have coded. They are identical except for the “start time” date in the google event.

Screen Shot 2022-09-13 at 1.17.05 PM1175×263 37.4 KB

Does anyone know what I could be doing differently?

posts.author: sorensonsolutions (Sarah)
posts.cookedHtml: This is also super frustrating to me! Why can’t you have multiple integration recipes running for different date columns? I have multiple due dates / appt dates in each item. Silly that it can only sync really with one. (although the calendar “sync” and the google cal integration are actually two different things, as I finally found out the hard way)

posts.author: henry45 (Henry)
posts.cookedHtml: "I’m making a content board that connects with Google Calendar. I want to have 3 columns with 3 dates for each item, and I want each of those 3 dates to show up as separate events in Google Calendar. But even when I try to connect them multiple times, only 1 event shows up for each item. I’ve tried two different connections, but they’re almost the same except for the start time.
